name: BotWorld4U FileStore Shortener Bot
description: Telegram file store shortener bot with Heroku mini-app verify gateway, hidden shortlinks, secure anti-bypass verification, primary + extra DB channels, custom captions, force-sub, premium, and auto BotFather commands. Fill root config.py before deploy.

CONFIG_NOTE.description: Main setup is inside root config.py in repo. Keep this value unchanged.

HEROKU_APP_NAME.description: Optional: your Heroku app name. If WEB_APP_URL in config.py is blank, bot uses this to build https://APP.herokuapp.com gateway URL.
